title: Stores Procurement through AP Central Stores Purchase Department
text_english: All stores required for use in the public services of the {{department_name}} shall be purchased THROUGH the Director, Printing, Stationery & Stores Purchase Department (Central Stores Purchase, CSP), Government of Andhra Pradesh, having STATE-WIDE jurisdiction in respect of purchases — EXCEPT for: (a) perishable articles (fruits, fish, foodstuff, tinned/bottled food and drinks); (b) bulk-contract controlled articles like cement, iron and steel; (c) newspapers, journals and other periodicals; (d) common-use office articles whose ESTIMATED VALUE does not exceed Rs.{{direct_purchase_ceiling}} (default Rs.2,000) and which are NOT on rate or running contract; (e) emergency machinery spares; (f) live-stock and fodder; (g) medical supplies from GoI Medical Stores; (h) Government-institution-manufactured articles (Jails, State Workshops, Textile Training Centre); (i) Khadi articles which shall first be sourced from the AP Khadi & Village Industries Board; (j) other items listed under Article 123 of the AP Financial Code Vol-I. All such direct departmental purchases shall be subject to the existence of budget provision and competent sanction.
